---
title: "Hubert Carey Brock"
---

## Hubert Carey Brock

**Dates:** (b. 2 Nov 1883)

### Description

eldest son of the Rev Henry Walter Brock

### Biography

He married (1919) Edna Mary Scott [LG 1952 Brock]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 8th [1883]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
